title: MikroTik SFP/SFP+/SFP28 optical module XS+85LC01D, MM, 100m, 850nm
description: XS+85LC01D is a multimode SFP/SFP+SFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 25 Gbps, supporting lower speeds of 1 Gbps and 10 Gbps with a wavelength of 850 nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 100 m . The module is compatible with all active components from MikroTik as well as devices from other manufacturers "cisco compatible". A perfect choice for MikroTik devices such as CCR2116, RB5009 netPower or variety of CRS and CSS switches
